				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-cc3d0bd elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="cc3d0bd" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p> Michael’s House is dedicated to providing comprehensive, evidence-based, integrated treatment that addresses both substance use and co-occurring mental health conditions. For over 30 years, our evidence-based methods have resulted in healthy rates of long-term recovery from drug and alcohol addiction, and our commitment to patient-centered care affords us the flexibility to address each patient’s unique needs.</p>								</div>

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Your Story: Starting Addiction Treatment</h3>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-4885ea5 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="4885ea5" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">A Drug Rehab Facility Providing Personalized Treatment that Meets You Where You Are</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-08071d5 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="08071d5" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>The accredited treatment programs at Michael’s House are nationally recognized for integrated and evidence-based methods that guide individuals with addiction and mental health disorders toward long-term recovery. With a full continuum of care, we welcome and nurture patients at our beautiful, serene campus in Southern California. Whether local to Palm Springs, or traveling from another state, each individual can find a chance for hope and healing with our caring staff.</p>								</div>

					<div class="elementor-testimonial__text">
						I had a great experience at Micheal’s house. I learned so much including coping skills, how to deal with trauma, and working the steps. The food was amazing. The RC staff was very supportive and helped me gain confidence and self love. The nursing staff was amazing and they motivated me to take my meds when I needed to and heal from all the hurt. 					</div>

						<div class="elementor-testimonial__footer">
								<cite class="elementor-testimonial__cite"><span class="elementor-testimonial__name">Brayden Hester</span><span class="elementor-testimonial__title">Michael's House Alumni</span></cite>			</div>

					<div class="elementor-testimonial__text">

the staff that i trust in a safe environment.					</div>
									</div>
						<div class="elementor-testimonial__footer">
								<cite class="elementor-testimonial__cite"><span class="elementor-testimonial__name">Angie</span><span class="elementor-testimonial__title">Michael's House Alumni</span></cite>			</div>
		</div>

Even after treatment, they truly go above and beyond to ensure a successful recovery! I would recommend this place to anyone who asks for the help. It really does work, if you keep an open mind and listen to what they have teach you.					</div>

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

Drug and Alcohol Rehab in Palm Springs, CA
 

 

 

 

 
Michael's House has been a haven of hope and healing providing evidence-based addiction treatment for over three decades.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Get Started • 760.548.4032 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Get Help Now! 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
We accept most health insurance policies
 

 

 

 

 
Michael’s House works with many insurance providers to guarantee you the highest quality of treatment at the most affordable cost.
 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 Aetna 
 

 

 
 
 
 Humana 
 

 

 
 
 
 Blue Cross Blue Shield 
 

 

 
 
 
 VA Insurance 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Verify Your Insurance Today! 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
"Michael's House
 

 

 

 

 
Saved My Life!
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Crystal
Former Patient
 

 

 

 

 
©UHS of Delaware, Inc. All Rights Reserved.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Overcoming Drug and Alcohol Addiction
 

 

 

 

 
A History of Hope Restored
 

 

 

 

 
 Michael’s House is dedicated to providing comprehensive, evidence-based, integrated treatment that addresses both substance use and co-occurring mental health conditions. For over 30 years, our evidence-based methods have resulted in healthy rates of long-term recovery from drug and alcohol addiction, and our commitment to patient-centered care affords us the flexibility to address each patient’s unique needs.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Learn More About Us 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Your Story: Starting Addiction Treatment
 

 

 

 

 
A Drug Rehab Facility Providing Personalized Treatment that Meets You Where You Are
 

 

 

 

 
The accredited treatment programs at Michael’s House are nationally recognized for integrated and evidence-based methods that guide individuals with addiction and mental health disorders toward long-term recovery. With a full continuum of care, we welcome and nurture patients at our beautiful, serene campus in Southern California. Whether local to Palm Springs, or traveling from another state, each individual can find a chance for hope and healing with our caring staff.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Learn More About Our Programs 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 I had a great experience at Micheal’s house. I learned so much including coping skills, how to deal with trauma, and working the steps. The food was amazing. The RC staff was very supportive and helped me gain confidence and self love. The nursing staff was amazing and they motivated me to take my meds when I needed to and heal from all the hurt. 

 

 

 Brayden Hester Michael's House Alumni 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Best place to get clean! 2nd time here in 6 years and I traveled all the way across the country to receive the best treatment possible. I would highly recommend this program to anyone. the only downside is it is not a long term program which is a shame because i would love to stay with
the staff that i trust in a safe environment. 

 

 

 Angie Michael's House Alumni 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Michael's house helped save my life. The program is structured, everyone on staff cares about what they do, and it is a safe, fun place to recover. Even after treatment, they truly go above and beyond to ensure a successful recovery! I would recommend this place to anyone who asks for the help. It really does work, if you keep an open mind and listen to what they have teach you. 

 

 

 Jordan Smith Michael's House Alumni 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Alumni's Successes and Stories
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 4.67 / 5 

 I was treated with dignity and respect 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 4.79 / 5 

 I feel better now than when I was admitted 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 4.63 / 5 

 I was very satisfied with my treatment 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
* Survey data was collected from January 2025 to June 2025 through Mental Health Outcomes, LLC, which benchmarks patient satisfaction data for over 380 psychiatric hospitals
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Empathy: Supporting Healing and Trust

Empathy is at the heart of our patient-centered care, guiding how we listen, understand, and support each patient’s healing process. Learn more about our commitment to compassion and the respect we have towards all patient experiences in this short video.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Get Started With…
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Alcohol Addiction Treatment 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Cocaine Addiction Treatment 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Meth Addiction Treatment 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Heroin Addiction Treatment 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Your Story: Starting Substance Programs
 

 

 

 

 
The First Step to Breaking the Cycle of Addiction
 

 

 

 

 
Everyone experiences addiction differently, and each person’s story is unique. Whatever the substance, the first step is beginning a program tailored to your specific substance of choice. It could be drugs like cocaine or methamphetamines, or alcohol—all can ensnare a user in the cycle of addiction. A professional substance abuse treatment program is the best way to break the cycle. 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 See All Substance Abuse Programs 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Your Story: Starting Therapy Programs
 

 

 

 

 
Integrated, Evidence-Based Methods with Proven Results
 

 

 

 

 
Our treatment model utilizes individual and group therapies, cognitive-behavioral therapy (CBT), dialectical behavior therapy (DBT) skills, motivational interviewing (MI) methods and philosophies, and recognizes stages of change in the recovery process to create an individualized path toward sustained recovery. 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 See All Substance Abuse Programs 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Get Started With…
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Cognitive Therapy 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Dialectical Therapy 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Group Therapy 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Individual Therapy 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Don’t Wait to Start the Healing Journey
 

 

 

 

 
Accredited, Evidence-Based Treatment Options You Can Trust!
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Contact us today to start your journey!
 

 

 

 

 
If you or a loved one is experiencing addiction, we’re here to help. Call 760.548.4032 or contact us online to learn more.

	<article id="post-93" class="post-93 page type-page status-publish has-post-thumbnail hentry">
	
	<div class="entry-content">
				<div data-elementor-type="wp-page" data-elementor-id="93" class="elementor elementor-93" data-elementor-post-type="page">
						<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-38495ec elementor-section-content-middle elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="38495ec" data-element_type="section" data-e-type="section" data-settings="{"background_background":"classic"}">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-a830ec4" data-id="a830ec4" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p><strong>When Arlene Rosen lost her son Michael to a drug overdose</strong>, she started a treatment center to help spare other families from the pain she experienced. <a href="/history/">Michael’s House opened in 1989</a> and has been serving patients and their families through comprehensive, integrated treatment for over three  decades.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-wrapper elementor-open-inline">
			<div class="elementor-video"></div>		</div>
						</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-2642cca elementor-section-content-middle elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="2642cca" data-element_type="section" data-e-type="section">

					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-33 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-4c0bad9" data-id="4c0bad9" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">

				<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-33 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-c35c590" data-id="c35c590" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Michael’s House is nationally recognized for providing integrated treatment for drug and alcohol addiction and co-occurring mental health issues, such as depression, anxiety, bipolar disorder, trauma, grief/loss, personality disorders, and similar conditions. </p>
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">We are located at the foot of the towering San Jacinto mountain range in Palm Springs, California. Our <a href="/about/virtual-tour/">modern, restorative facility</a> provides security and privacy for patients seeking healing and recovery. Contact us at <a href='tel:7605484032'>760.548.4032</a> to learn how we can help you or a loved one.</span></p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>

		</section>

						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Our Staff</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-4dd6f20 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="4dd6f20" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Our program treats patients aged 18 and older in both residential and outpatient settings. The staff is specially trained in the Foundations Recovery Network treatment model to address the complex needs of individuals with co-occurring disorders and to treat the whole person in a comprehensive way.</p><p>We support patients with an integrated, multidisciplinary team. Primary therapists, consulting physicians, residential therapists, nurses, group leaders, and others are all part of a patient’s treatment team. </p>								</div>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-8a17f57 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="8a17f57" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Dual Diagnosis</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-4518ea2 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="4518ea2" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Mental disorders and addiction often go hand in hand. According to the National Institute on Drug Abuse (NIDA), people diagnosed with a mood or anxiety disorder are twice as likely to struggle with addiction.</p><p>Unfortunately, people with both mental illnesses and addiction tend to slip through the cracks of the modern medical world and may not get the help they need. They may see their doctors for their medical condition and see addiction counselors for their addiction. However, until the two forms of therapy are united, the person is unlikely to see any real relief. </p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>The purpose statement of Michael’s House and its parent company Foundations Recovery Network is to create <a href="/testimonials/">lifetime relationships for long-term recovery</a>. </p>								</div>
				</div>

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">

				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<h4>We Strive for Excellence</h4><p>Our efforts are directed toward one primary goal: excellence in all that we do. From our treatment philosophies to our daily interactions, we are committed to offering world-class experiences to those whom we serve. We honor this commitment by continuously seeking new, innovative, evidence-based approaches to our work.</p>								</div>

<lord-icon

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-b48bba4 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="b48bba4" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<h4>We Promote Healing with Compassion</h4><p>Effective treatment takes a holistic, flexible, and empathetic approach to each individual. Our Dual Diagnosis strategies are motivational, not confrontational, and fully integrated, meaning we treat both substance use and mental health conditions simultaneously. We meet people where they are and take them through a compassionate, individualized, and supportive process. </p>								</div>

							<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-fddbfc4" data-id="fddbfc4" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-1a6fd06 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="1a6fd06" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Our Mission</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-422907f elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="422907f" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Michael’s House is dedicated to providing those experiencing addiction and mental health issues with integrated treatment solutions that will set them and their loved ones up for recovery that can last a lifetime and enable them to live the healthy, happy lives they deserve. </p>								</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-38b1939 elementor-widget-divider--view-line elementor-widget elementor-widget-divider" data-id="38b1939" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="divider.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-divider">
			<span class="elementor-divider-separator">
						</span>
		</div>
						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-589c119 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="589c119" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Our Standards</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-5e3270b elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="5e3270b" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<ul><li>Respect and dignity in the treatment of patients and their families</li><li>Quality care focusing on the development of constructive life skills</li><li>Education to help patients understand the science of addiction in order to recover and reduce the risk of relapse</li><li>Sensitivity to cultural diversity</li><li>Affordable care without sacrificing quality or comfort</li></ul>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
		<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-d1384b5 e-flex e-con-boxed e-con e-parent" data-id="d1384b5" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container">

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-1491ec3 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="1491ec3" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<h2>The National Action Alliance</h2><p><img decoding="async" class="size-full wp-image-10909 alignright" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20207%20110'%3E%3C/svg%3E" alt="" width="207" height="110" data-lazy-src="https://michaelshouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/action-alliance.png" /><noscript><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="size-full wp-image-10909 alignright" src="https://michaelshouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/action-alliance.png" alt="" width="207" height="110" /></noscript>Michael’s House is proud to work towards improving effective suicide prevention efforts within healthcare settings as called for in the <a href="https://www.hhs.gov/programs/prevention-and-wellness/mental-health-substance-use-disorder/national-strategy-suicide-prevention/index.html" rel="noopener external">National Strategy for Suicide Prevention (National Strategy)</a>. We are committed to providing education and resources to the communities we serve, working to provide best practice care to our patients.</p><p>Universal Health Services, Inc. (UHS), which provides care through its national network of subsidiaries, has supported <a href="https://theactionalliance.org/" rel="noopener external">the National Action Alliance for Suicide Prevention </a>(Action Alliance) as an Executive Committee member for over a decade. The Action Alliance is the country’s public-private partnership, working to advance the <a href="https://www.hhs.gov/programs/prevention-and-wellness/mental-health-substance-use-disorder/national-strategy-suicide-prevention/index.html" rel="noopener external">National Strategy for Suicide Prevention</a>, which includes the goal of expanding implementation of best practices for suicide care across the country.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
				</div>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-b577f9d elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="b577f9d" data-element_type="section" data-e-type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-9d6624f" data-id="9d6624f" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-dece7e8 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="dece7e8" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Contact Michael's House to Learn How We Can Help Promote Healing in Your Life</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-bf0d797 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="bf0d797" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>If you or a loved one is experiencing addiction, we’re here to help. Call <a href='tel:7605484032'>760.548.4032</a> or contact us online to <a href="/what-to-expect/">learn more about our programs</a>. With our serene location and integrated, multidisciplinary treatment program, we are ready to help you find the road to recovery. </p>								</div>

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

About Michael’s House Treatment Center
 

 

 
 
 Home 
 
 About Michael’s House Treatment Center
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Providing Trusted, Evidence-Based 
Treatment for Three Decades and Counting
 

 

 

 

 
If you or a loved one is experiencing addiction, we’re here to help.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Get Started • 760.548.4032 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Verify Your Insurance! 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 When Arlene Rosen lost her son Michael to a drug overdose , she started a treatment center to help spare other families from the pain she experienced. Michael’s House opened in 1989 and has been serving patients and their families through comprehensive, integrated treatment for over three decades.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Michael’s House is nationally recognized for providing integrated treatment for drug and alcohol addiction and co-occurring mental health issues, such as depression, anxiety, bipolar disorder, trauma, grief/loss, personality disorders, and similar conditions. 

 We are located at the foot of the towering San Jacinto mountain range in Palm Springs, California. Our modern, restorative facility provides security and privacy for patients seeking healing and recovery. Contact us at 760.548.4032 to learn how we can help you or a loved one. 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Staff
 

 

 

 

 
Our program treats patients aged 18 and older in both residential and outpatient settings. The staff is specially trained in the Foundations Recovery Network treatment model to address the complex needs of individuals with co-occurring disorders and to treat the whole person in a comprehensive way.

We support patients with an integrated, multidisciplinary team. Primary therapists, consulting physicians, residential therapists, nurses, group leaders, and others are all part of a patient’s treatment team. 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Treatment
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Individual psychotherapy

Primary therapy groups

Dialectical behavior therapy (DBT)

Structured metaphor/experiential groups

Holistic therapy, such as yoga and mindful movement
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Dual diagnosis groups

Medication groups

Relapse prevention groups

Trauma therapy

12-Step meetings – DDRA, CoDA, AA, NA, OA

Co-dependency groups
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Dual Diagnosis
 

 

 

 

 
Mental disorders and addiction often go hand in hand. According to the National Institute on Drug Abuse (NIDA), people diagnosed with a mood or anxiety disorder are twice as likely to struggle with addiction.

Unfortunately, people with both mental illnesses and addiction tend to slip through the cracks of the modern medical world and may not get the help they need. They may see their doctors for their medical condition and see addiction counselors for their addiction. However, until the two forms of therapy are united, the person is unlikely to see any real relief. 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Values
 

 

 

 

 
The purpose statement of Michael’s House and its parent company Foundations Recovery Network is to create lifetime relationships for long-term recovery . 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
We Serve with Integrity

Our reputation is built on trust and honesty. We are thoughtful, intentional, and ethical in all our actions in order to have a lifelong, meaningful impact on those we serve.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
We Empower People

People are the foundation of our organization. Our approach to those we serve allows them to make—and be—the change they want to see in themselves and in the world.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
We Strive for Excellence

Our efforts are directed toward one primary goal: excellence in all that we do. From our treatment philosophies to our daily interactions, we are committed to offering world-class experiences to those whom we serve. We honor this commitment by continuously seeking new, innovative, evidence-based approaches to our work.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
We Promote Healing with Compassion

Effective treatment takes a holistic, flexible, and empathetic approach to each individual. Our Dual Diagnosis strategies are motivational, not confrontational, and fully integrated, meaning we treat both substance use and mental health conditions simultaneously. We meet people where they are and take them through a compassionate, individualized, and supportive process. 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Mission
 

 

 

 

 
Michael’s House is dedicated to providing those experiencing addiction and mental health issues with integrated treatment solutions that will set them and their loved ones up for recovery that can last a lifetime and enable them to live the healthy, happy lives they deserve. 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Standards
 

 

 

 

 
Respect and dignity in the treatment of patients and their families

Quality care focusing on the development of constructive life skills

Education to help patients understand the science of addiction in order to recover and reduce the risk of relapse

Sensitivity to cultural diversity

Affordable care without sacrificing quality or comfort
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
The National Action Alliance

 Michael’s House is proud to work towards improving effective suicide prevention efforts within healthcare settings as called for in the National Strategy for Suicide Prevention (National Strategy) . We are committed to providing education and resources to the communities we serve, working to provide best practice care to our patients.

Universal Health Services, Inc. (UHS), which provides care through its national network of subsidiaries, has supported the National Action Alliance for Suicide Prevention  (Action Alliance) as an Executive Committee member for over a decade. The Action Alliance is the country’s public-private partnership, working to advance the National Strategy for Suicide Prevention , which includes the goal of expanding implementation of best practices for suicide care across the country.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Contact Michael's House to Learn How We Can Help Promote Healing in Your Life
 

 

 

 

 
If you or a loved one is experiencing addiction, we’re here to help. Call 760.548.4032 or contact us online to learn more about our programs . With our serene location and integrated, multidisciplinary treatment program, we are ready to help you find the road to recovery. 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Michael's House
 

 

 

 

 Michael’s House has been proudly serving individuals with co-occurring disorders since 1989. 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Call us Today 760.548.4032 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 We are here for you. 
Get in Touch!

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

	<article id="post-817" class="post-817 page type-page status-publish hentry">
	
	<div class="entry-content">
				<div data-elementor-type="wp-page" data-elementor-id="817" class="elementor elementor-817" data-elementor-post-type="page">
						<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-4c2bac4f elementor-section-content-middle elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="4c2bac4f" data-element_type="section" data-e-type="section" data-settings="{"background_background":"classic"}">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-3ce6dfb4" data-id="3ce6dfb4" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-4098cd29 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="4098cd29" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" class="interior-img alignright wp-image-3303 size-medium" src="https://michaelshouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/lp-Insurance-We-Accept-300x200.jpeg" alt="a woman discusses rehab insurance coverage with a potential client" width="300" height="200" srcset="https://michaelshouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/lp-Insurance-We-Accept-300x200.jpeg 300w, https://michaelshouse.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/lp-Insurance-We-Accept.jpeg 500w" sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" /><strong>At Michael’s House, we have been helping people find healing and recovery for over thirty years.</strong> We do this by partnering with major insurance providers to help our patients receive the treatment they need. However, even for those patients with health insurance, it can be challenging to navigate the maze of insurance coverage for co-occurring disorders, substance abuse, or alcohol addiction.</p><p>Addiction is a chronic disease. Those struggling with addiction and co-occurring mental health issues cannot simply stop using drugs for a few days and be cured. Most patients need long-term or repeated care to stop using completely and recover their lives.<sup>1</sup></p><p>Michael’s House can help verify insurance and answer questions related to rehab admissions so you can begin needed treatment as soon as possible. Call <a href='tel:7605484032'>760.548.4032</a> to get started.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-761b79e8 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="761b79e8" data-element_type="section" data-e-type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-23805733" data-id="23805733" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-6d226584 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="6d226584" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Affordable Care Act and Rehab Insurance Coverage</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2d53ae48 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="2d53ae48" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>According to the Affordable Care Act (ACA), all health insurance plans must cover the following:</p><ul><li>Behavioral health treatment, such as psychotherapy and counseling</li><li>Mental and behavioral health inpatient services</li><li>Substance use disorder (commonly known as substance abuse) treatment.<sup>2</sup></li></ul>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-26f4e585 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="26f4e585" data-element_type="section" data-e-type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-5371c227" data-id="5371c227" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-23878ec elementor-widget-divider--view-line elementor-widget elementor-widget-divider" data-id="23878ec" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="divider.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-divider">
			<span class="elementor-divider-separator">
						</span>
		</div>
						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-78bb5cd elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="78bb5cd" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Insurance Coverage Verification</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-4ca2a2b7 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="4ca2a2b7" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Navigating the different insurance companies, their various subsidiaries, and the numerous different plans available from each is daunting. Even if you’re an experienced researcher or very web-savvy, in many cases, you’ll only be guessing as to which services are covered.</p><p>Do you have Blue Cross Blue Shield, Anthem Blue Cross, or Blue Shield? It makes a difference. And did you know that Blue Shield’s California network is yet another entity—one that isn’t national? Let Michael’s House insurance coverage verification specialists help you cut through the confusion. By placing a call to <a href='tel:7605484032'>760.548.4032</a> with your insurance information in hand, we can help you sort through the options and tell you how each one affects your coverage.</p><p>We are in-network with most insurance providers. Some that we work with include:</p>								</div>
				</div>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-2f670df2 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="2f670df2" data-element_type="section" data-e-type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-79a326af" data-id="79a326af" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-4abd9bc9 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="4abd9bc9" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<ul>
 	<li>Aetna®</li>
 	<li>Cigna®</li>
 	<li>Anthem</li>
 	<li>BlueCross BlueShield®</li>
 	<li>Magellan</li>
 	<li>ComPsych®</li>
 	<li>4 your Choice</li>
</ul>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
				<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-26ca102c" data-id="26ca102c" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-eae0ac8 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="eae0ac8" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<ul>
 	<li>Humana®</li>
 	<li>Prime Healthcare</li>
 	<li>Value Options</li>
 	<li>Beacon</li>
 	<li>Connecticut Genera</li>
 	<li>VA Insurance</li>
</ul>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-e386566 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="e386566" data-element_type="section" data-e-type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">
					<div class="elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-d526e96" data-id="d526e96" data-element_type="column" data-e-type="column">
			<div class="elementor-widget-wrap elementor-element-populated">
						<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-ebeaf9b elementor-widget-divider--view-line elementor-widget elementor-widget-divider" data-id="ebeaf9b" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="divider.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
							<div class="elementor-divider">
			<span class="elementor-divider-separator">
						</span>
		</div>
						</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-bcd2190 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="bcd2190" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">How To Determine Your Coverage</h2>				</div>
				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-55f8800 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="55f8800" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>How To Determine Your Coverage<br />When someone requires substance abuse treatment for drugs, alcohol, or a co-occurring disorder, there are often concerns about how much it will cost and who will pay.</p><p>Michael’s House is here to help. You can call us now at <a href='tel:7605484032'>760.548.4032</a>—you will need to have your insurance info available—and we can give you all the information you need. We can even recommend other programs if ours isn’t the best fit.</p><p>Some variations of insurance plans may work like HMOs, and others like PPOs. Certain insurance companies may work only with their own providers or serve an extensive network. Certain providers reimburse the member instead of the provider. Each insurance provider may handle their claims in a slightly different manner.</p>								</div>
				</div>
					</div>
		</div>
					</div>
		</section>
				<section class="elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-4d8c341 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default" data-id="4d8c341" data-element_type="section" data-e-type="section">
						<div class="elementor-container elementor-column-gap-default">

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

Insurance We Accept

 Insurance We Accept
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Providing Trusted, Evidence-Based 
Treatment for Three Decades and Counting
 

 

 

 

 
If you or a loved one is experiencing addiction, we’re here to help.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Get Started • 760.548.4032 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Verify Your Insurance! 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 At Michael’s House, we have been helping people find healing and recovery for over thirty years. We do this by partnering with major insurance providers to help our patients receive the treatment they need. However, even for those patients with health insurance, it can be challenging to navigate the maze of insurance coverage for co-occurring disorders, substance abuse, or alcohol addiction.

Addiction is a chronic disease. Those struggling with addiction and co-occurring mental health issues cannot simply stop using drugs for a few days and be cured. Most patients need long-term or repeated care to stop using completely and recover their lives. 1 

Michael’s House can help verify insurance and answer questions related to rehab admissions so you can begin needed treatment as soon as possible. Call 760.548.4032 to get started.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Affordable Care Act and Rehab Insurance Coverage
 

 

 

 

 
According to the Affordable Care Act (ACA), all health insurance plans must cover the following:
 
Behavioral health treatment, such as psychotherapy and counseling

Mental and behavioral health inpatient services

Substance use disorder (commonly known as substance abuse) treatment. 2 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
Insurance Coverage Verification
 

 

 

 

 
Navigating the different insurance companies, their various subsidiaries, and the numerous different plans available from each is daunting. Even if you’re an experienced researcher or very web-savvy, in many cases, you’ll only be guessing as to which services are covered.

Do you have Blue Cross Blue Shield, Anthem Blue Cross, or Blue Shield? It makes a difference. And did you know that Blue Shield’s California network is yet another entity—one that isn’t national? Let Michael’s House insurance coverage verification specialists help you cut through the confusion. By placing a call to 760.548.4032 with your insurance information in hand, we can help you sort through the options and tell you how each one affects your coverage.

We are in-network with most insurance providers. Some that we work with include:
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
Aetna®

 
Cigna®

 
Anthem

 
BlueCross BlueShield®

 
Magellan

 
ComPsych®

 
4 your Choice

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
Humana®

 
Prime Healthcare

 
Value Options

 
Beacon

 
Connecticut Genera

 
VA Insurance

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
How To Determine Your Coverage
 

 

 

 

 
How To Determine Your Coverage
When someone requires substance abuse treatment for drugs, alcohol, or a co-occurring disorder, there are often concerns about how much it will cost and who will pay.

Michael’s House is here to help. You can call us now at 760.548.4032 —you will need to have your insurance info available—and we can give you all the information you need. We can even recommend other programs if ours isn’t the best fit.

Some variations of insurance plans may work like HMOs, and others like PPOs. Certain insurance companies may work only with their own providers or serve an extensive network. Certain providers reimburse the member instead of the provider. Each insurance provider may handle their claims in a slightly different manner.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
Common Questions We Can Answer
 

 

 

 

 
Am I “in-network” or “out-of-network”?

Is detox covered or not?

What forms of treatment are covered by my insurance?

How many days are covered for residential treatment?

What’s the difference between Blue Shield in and out of California?

Isn’t all Blue Cross Blue Shield coverage the same?

What is Anthem, and how is it linked to BCBS?
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Contact Michael's House with Your Questions About Rehab Insurance Coverage
 

 

 

 

 
While you likely have some form of treatment covered by your insurance, it is essential to have clarity in this process. Move past the confusion and get the answers you need by giving us a call. If you don’t have insurance, that is not a problem, as we are glad to help you learn more about your treatment options. Call us at 760.548.4032 or contact us online today.
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 
Footnotes

1 “Treatment Approaches for Drug Addiction.” National Institute on Drug Abuse. N.p., n.d. Web. Accessed 01 Aug. 2017. 

2 “Mental health and substance abuse health coverage options.” HealthCare.gov. N.p., n.d. Web. Accessed 01 Aug. 2017. 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Michael's House
 

 

 

 

 Michael’s House has been proudly serving individuals with co-occurring disorders since 1989. 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Call us Today 760.548.4032 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 We are here for you. 
Get in Touch!

Accredited, Evidence-Based Treatment Options You Can Trust!
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Contact us today to start your journey!
 

 

 

 

 
If you or a loved one is experiencing addiction, we’re here to help. Call 760.548.4032 or contact us online to learn more.

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}

rawMentions: Michael’s House is dedicated to providing comprehensive, evidence-based, integrated treatment that addresses both substance use and co-occurring mental health conditions.
Our Dual Diagnosis strategies are motivational, not confrontational, and fully integrated, meaning we treat both substance use and mental health conditions simultaneously.

Michael’s House is nationally recognized for providing integrated treatment for drug and alcohol addiction and co-occurring mental health issues, such as depression, anxiety, bipolar disorder, trauma, grief/loss, personality disorders, and similar conditions.

The staff is specially trained in the Foundations Recovery Network treatment model to address the complex needs of individuals with co-occurring disorders and to treat the whole person in a comprehensive way.
Michael’s House has been proudly serving individuals with co-occurring disorders since 1989.
However, even for those patients with health insurance, it can be challenging to navigate the maze of insurance coverage for co-occurring disorders, substance abuse, or alcohol addiction.
Those struggling with addiction and co-occurring mental health issues cannot simply stop using drugs for a few days and be cured.
When someone requires substance abuse treatment for drugs, alcohol, or a co-occurring disorder, there are often concerns about how much it will cost and who will pay.
